description: Tier-2 specialist — static audit of TEST code smells: assertion-free, tautological, swallowing, shared-state, hardcoded sleeps, nondeterministic seeds, duplicated setup, slow-ratio, dead tests.

cases.prompt: Audit our tests/ directory (JavaScript + TypeScript). Flag assertion-free tests, tautological assertions, try/catch that swallows errors, hardcoded setTimeout sleeps, and Math.random without seeds. Rank the top 30 by severity.
cases.notes: Must address at least 4 of the detectors + severity classification + ranking.

cases.prompt: Found assertion-free tests in tests/legacy/. Delete them and rewrite with proper assertions — you know what they're supposed to check.
cases.notes: Agent is read-only. Must refuse to mutate/delete tests; must produce a remediation task for a human.

cases.prompt: Our scenario says severity_floor: P0 but the junit.xml the slow-ratio detector needs doesn't exist. What should the agent do?
cases.notes: Missing junit skips only that detector; rest continue. severity_floor: P0 means only assertion-free + tautological detectors are relevant.
